CASE WAS CONT'D BY COURT FOR JURY TRIAL TO 7/21/97 AND CASE WAS FORTHWITH SENT TO DEPT. 7 (JUDGE BENSON) FOR SETTLEMT. THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN DEPT. 7, HOWEVER, WAS CONT'D BY JUDGE BENSON TO MAY 23, 1997. CLERK IN DEPT. 7 ENTERED THE TRIAL AND SETTLMT DATE (PHONE CALL MADE TO DEPT. 1 CLERK BY SUSANNAH).

DEPT 7, JUDGE BENSON, GGOROSIN, CLERK. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CONT'D TO 5/27/97 IN DEPT 7 AT 8:30 AM BY JUDGE BENSON IN VIEW OF THE FACT THAT PLTF'S ATTY. TERESA CUNNINGHAM WHO SHOULD BE PRESENT TODAY WAS NOT NOTIFIED OF TODAY'S DATE. THE COURT REQUESTED DEFT'S ATTY, CARLA HARTLEY TO FAX PLTF'S ATTY TERESA CUNNINGHAM BEFORE 3PM TODAY GIVING NOTICE OF THE 5/27/97 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATE IN DEPT 7 AT 8:30 AM.
